name: From Notebook to Platform
description: Build a production ML platform layer by layer — from your first model in training to a monitored, reliable serving system.

encounters.draftHint: Your model is trained. Now you need to serve predictions and make experiments reproducible. What will you add?
Training takes too long and your models need versioning. What will speed things up and keep deployments safe?
Your platform handles multiple models. What will catch data drift before it becomes a business problem?
